{{Infobox character
|name=Cheshire Cat
|species=Cat
|status=<span class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Spoiler — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">Alive</span>
|first_seen=Chapter 6
}}

== Biography ==
The '''Cheshire Cat''' is a grinning cat who can vanish at will, leaving only its smile. It gives Alice riddling directions and unsettles the [[Queen of Hearts]].


[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Supporting Characters]]
[[Category:Characters (Book 1)]]
